settings.title: Monster Piercing | Flatback Labrets
settings.text:
Discover comfort, style, and versatility in our Flatbacks Collection, designed for those who love beautiful, secure, and high quality body jewellery. Available in push fit, internal thread, external thread, and threadless labret styles, each piece is crafted to provide a snug and smooth fit that feels as good as it looks.

Explore a range of premium materials including titanium, gold, steel, and silver, offering both luxury and everyday durability. With interchangeable tops and separate labrets available, you can mix and match to create your perfect combination — from minimalist studs to sparkling statement pieces.

Designed for ear, lip, nose, and cartilage piercings, our flatbacks combine function and fashion, making them ideal for stacking, layering, or wearing solo. Whether you prefer simple gold elegance or sleek titanium precision, this collection gives you endless ways to express your style.

settings.question: What are flatback studs?
settings.answer: Flatback studs, also known as labrets, feature a smooth flat base that sits comfortably against the skin with a decorative top on the other end. They’re designed for piercings such as helix, tragus, conch, lobe, and lip piercings, offering a secure and comfortable fit for daily wear.

settings.question: What materials do your flatback studs come in?
settings.answer: We offer flatbacks in a range of high-quality materials including solid gold, implant-grade titanium, sterling silver, 316L surgical steel, and bioflex. The bioflex options include flexible posts paired with solid gold tops for maximum comfort and luxury.

settings.question: Are your flatbacks safe for sensitive skin?
settings.answer: Yes. Our titanium and solid gold flatbacks are hypoallergenic and safe for sensitive or newly healed piercings. Silver and steel options are best suited for healed piercings, while bioflex provides flexibility and comfort for sensitive areas.

settings.question: What piercings can flatback studs be used for?
settings.answer:
Flatbacks are extremely versatile. They’re commonly used in ear piercings (helix,
conch, tragus, lobe), lip piercings, and cartilage piercings. With the right attachments, they can also be adapted for floating belly rings and nose screws using our interchangeable charm tops.
